body.p: Continuation blocks inside list items must align under list text.

li.p: This item contains a long paragraph that should wrap naturally in Word. The continuation line should align under the item text rather than under the ordered-list number.
This second paragraph is continuation content inside the same list item.
li.note: This note is continuation content inside the ordered list item.

li.p: This item contains a table as continuation content.
This bullet item contains continuation text.
The second paragraph should align with the bullet item text.
